Very sweet crisp apples on top of and overhanging low private residence fence. Deliciously green over the summer and perfectly ripen around late September/early October. Access: Private but overhanging.
Falling Fruit access: Private but overhanging.
Small tasty grapes outside the stone wall of a private residence. Perfectly ripe around mid September. Wash thoroughly before eating. Access: Private but overhanging.
Falling Fruit access: Private but overhanging.
